title: Pseudosonic beamer
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''pseudosonic beamer''' was a weapon considered to be outdated by the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. They were mounted on [[Black Hole-class Salvage Dreadnought|''Black Hole''-class Salvage Dreadnought]] employed by the [[Ugor/Legends|Ugors]].

==Appearances==
*[[Scavenger Hunt (adventure)|''Scavenger Hunt'']]
